title: Phase 10: Graph RAG G5 Trust UX — confidence badges, entity panel, source provenance
description: Confidence badges on citations, entity panel (showing which entities were used in the graph traversal), source provenance (which documents/nodes contributed to the answer). All UI is examiner-facing — must maintain UPL compliance (factual display only, no legal conclusions).
acceptance_criteria: Confidence badges: visual indicator on each chat response showing the graph RAG confidence (high/medium/low) — GREEN zone factual data only
Entity panel: collapsible sidebar or drawer showing which graph entities were referenced in generating the response
Source provenance: list of source documents and their relevance scores that contributed to the response
All UI maintains UPL compliance (factual display only, no legal conclusions)
Tests for new components and any new API endpoints
